metrics.name: stackra.geofence.evaluations.total
metrics.description: Every GeofenceService::evaluate() call increments. Broken down by verdict + mode + fenceable model kind + calling feature.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.preflight.total
metrics.description: outcome: served / rate_limited / kill_switched / errored. Preflight traffic distinct from real evaluations.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.distance_to_fence_m
metrics.description: Distance distribution. Right-tail is 'user was very far outside the fence'.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.accuracy_m
metrics.description: Reported GPS accuracy distribution. SKIPPED verdicts should concentrate in the right tail.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.polygon_evaluator.fallback_total
metrics.description: reason: geoPHP not loaded / geoPHP returned null / geoPHP threw. Feeds decision on whether to require the geoPHP classmap in production.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.immutability_violations_total
metrics.description: MUST be 0 in production. Any non-zero value = code attempted to mutate a persisted row. Fires alerting.

metrics.name: stackra.geofence.registered_fenceable_aliases
metrics.description: Count of registered #[Geofenceable] classes. Observable gauge polled at scrape.
